title: Outlook Email Integration is Creating Updates

posts.author: cgrovender (Christopher Grovender)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi guys,

I’ve got Outlook integrated into my boards. Whenever it sends an email, it’s generating an update. Is there a way I can turn this off I’ve not been able to find? For those of us who’re set to receive emails when there’s a new update, we’re getting emailed twice every time this occurs.

Thanks for any help

posts.author: kirst (Kirst)
posts.cookedHtml: I’m in the same boat - I would also like to know how to turn these updates off! Did you ever figure it out?
